strategic_objective: Explore how class-conditioned variation and strong dependencies coexist and influence feature selection and model robustness.
key_checks: Analyze class-conditioned distribution profiles of features with strong variation (e8-e12)
Examine dependency concentration among strongly dependent features (e13-e22) in relation to class-conditioned variation
Investigate potential unstable feature importance or selection bias due to entangled variation and redundancy
success_criteria: Identification of balanced feature subsets preserving discriminative variation while minimizing redundancy
Insights into how interplay affects model robustness and feature importance stability
Evidence-based guidance for feature selection strategies under these conditions
router_constraints: preserve feature_scope for features e8 through e22
preserve evidence refs related to e8 through e22
